name: registry-mode --force refreshes every entry regardless of freshness (last-fetch marker ignored)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o10-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Rule x
prose.
MD
cat > $OUT/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml <<YAML
sources:
- id: forced-src
  name: F
  jurisdiction: us-government
  url: $OUT/src.md
  authoritative_publisher: Pub
  fetch_frequency: weekly
YAML
cd $OUT && mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo '2026-07-10T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/forced-src.txt && CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --force 2>e.err; grep -q 'total=1 processed=1 skipped=0' e.err && echo registry-mode-force-overrides-skip 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/forced-src.yaml
